title: Viability Milestone
subtitle: A stage of significant development
description: By week 24, your baby has reached an important milestone where survival outside the womb becomes possible with medical support. Growth continues steadily, and organs like the lungs are developing further.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements are strong and clearly noticeable
Lung development continues, though still maturing
You may feel regular patterns of activity and rest
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Practice light exercise and maintain proper posture

medical_checkups.note: This stage includes important screening and monitoring.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and fetal growth

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may schedule glucose testing around this time to assess blood sugar levels.

important_note: Reaching this stage is a significant milestone in your pregnancy journey.
reassurance: Your baby is developing steadily, and each week brings more strength and growth.
medical_disclaimer: Always follow your healthcare provider’s guidance for tests and care.

diabetes.personalized_description: Blood sugar management is especially important during glucose screening and ongoing development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Glucose levels may be evaluated through the glucose tolerance test.
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent management supports a healthy pregnancy.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support oxygen supply as your baby continues to grow.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this stage of development.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing growth and metabolic function.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: At this important milestone, managing multiple conditions requires consistent and mindful care.
priority_tips: Maintain a balanced and regular lifestyle
Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports continued healthy development.
